name: founder-os
description: Dev tooling for the founder-os plugin itself (test runners, CI). Not published; the plugin is distributed via .claude-plugin/plugin.json and the repo-root marketplace.json.

scripts.test: npm run test:schema && npm run test:claude-code && npm run test:opencode && npm run test:hooks && npm run test:settings && npm run test:redos-guard && npm run check:version-sync
